title: Korean-Style Pork Ssam
description: A Korean-inspired pork dish served with a sweet and spicy sauce, wrapped in a crispy lettuce leaf.

ingredients.name: Lettuce leaves (such as napa or romaine)

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together chili flakes, brown sugar, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
2. Add the sliced pork to the marinade and toss to coat.
3. Let the pork marinate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
5. Remove the pork from the marinade and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Brush the lettuce leaves with sesame oil.
7. Assemble the ssam by placing a few pieces of pork onto a lettuce leaf, followed by a spoonful of the marinade sauce.
9. Cook the pork to an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) to ensure food safety.
10. Let the pork rest for 5 minutes before slicing against the grain.
